chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.D- 1324 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on CMA 7079/2021 2.For Non-Prosecution. 12-10-2021 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon Advocate for the Petitioner. ****** 1. Urgency granted. 2. This matter is coming up for Non-Prosecution as to the office objections including objection regarding maintainability of this petition. While confronted, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the petitioner owns property, as mentioned in para-3 thereof, purchased pursuant to an agreement from the original owner; whereas, private respondents have managed a forged entry in respect of the property way back in 2004, which entry was subsequently cancelled. He submits that the present petition is only to the extent that action be initiated against the officials who have managed such entry. On perusal of record, it appears that there is series of civil litigations between the parties and admittedly same are pending on various stages; whereas petitioner has himself filed F.C. Suit No.71 of 2021 before the Court of Senior Civil Judge-II at Naushehro Feroze, hence disputed questions are involved and so also during pendency of civil litigations, we cannot grant prayer sought in this petition. Accordingly, this petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
